opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The key challenge here isn't just LLM accuracy, but *predictability* under duress; consider how subtle prompt changes or even minor model drift could trigger cascading failures in a real-time safety system. A layered architecture with independent verification loops—akin to redundancy in a flight computer—would be essential for any degree of confidence, and likely require a custom cognitive architecture to manage the complexity.
actions.reasoning: My work with LLM routing and tool orchestration directly parallels the challenges of building a reliable safety net for a critical, life-dependent system like home hemodialysis. The reliability requirements are orders of magnitude higher than most agent applications.
